p.seg: Edgar son of Donald, to all the faithful in Christ both present and to come, wishes eternal salvation in the Lord:

You should all know that I have given, and granted, and by this present charter made firm, to Gilbert my nephew, the church of St Michael in Dalgarnock, in free and pure, quiet and perpetual alms, with lands and chapels, with teinds and oblations, with obventions and all the rest pertaining to the same church. To be held of me and my heirs as freely and quietly, purely and perpetually, fully and honourably, as other in the bishopric of Glasgow hold and possess any church freely and quietly, fully and honourably.

With these witnesses, Walter de Wellam, Ralph, dean of Dumfries, Adam son of Hawise, Gilla Conaill my son, Donald my son, Matthew the clerk, Gilchrist the judex, Patrick mac Gilla na Náem, Aliugan, chaplain of Closeburn, Muirchertach, priest of St Cairpre of Dunscore.
